name: Boron
summary: Boron entry from SciSpace evidence pass. Evidence level: low.
description: Boron is a trace element implicated in bone and steroid biology; it may influence markers tied to mineral homeostasis and vitamin D/calcium-related regulation.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v8.2: Small human data suggest boron may influence inflammatory and hormone markers, but evidence remains limited.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: Small human data suggest boron may influence inflammatory and hormone markers, but evidence remains limited.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 1–10 mg/day supplemental boron; higher intakes need caution

sources.title: PubMed PMID 21129941. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
sources.citation: PubMed PMID 21129941. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
sources.note: evidence citation lookup; PMID source present in Evidence_Register
